kba_problem_summary: Patrol Read Mode is disabled by default on Dell VRTX chassis for HDD storage instead of Automatic
severity_justification: Minor reliability degradation on storage layer with potential for undetected latent disk errors; no impact on process control, safety or immediate production
occurrence_justification: Setting is disabled by default on the listed VRTX hardware when using HDD media, requiring only the presence of this specific virtualization chassis
detectability_justification: Requires manual login to CMC web interface to verify; no alarms, events or visible indications exist in DeltaV or Windows

modifiers_applied.reason: Simple configuration change via CMC that can be performed online without affecting VMs

architecture_level_description: Livello 3: Ingegneria e gestione (infrastruttura di virtualizzazione per server DeltaV)
affected_products: SE2530V1M99 VRTX - Domain Controller and Host Management Blade Server
workaround_description: No workaround listed; only a permanent configuration change procedure is provided
fix_reference: Section 3.1-3.2: Check Media Type and set Patrol Read Mode to Automatic via CMC if HDD
confidence_note: KBA non specifica le conseguenze operative concrete di Patrol Read disabilitato, rendendo la valutazione di severità parzialmente soggettiva
red_flags: Patrol Read disabled by default on specific hardware
notes: Si applica solo a sistemi con dischi HDD tradizionali. I sistemi SSD non sono interessati. La modifica può essere eseguita a sistema acceso senza impatto sulle VM.
